highlights.title: Message Analytics Dashboard
highlights.description: Add top-posts ranking, engagement breakdown by content type, and hourly activity patterns to the web dashboard.

highlights.title: Channel & Per-Message Engagement Stats
highlights.description: Track views, forwards, reply_count and store per-reaction data in a dedicated message_reactions table; surface averages in Web UI and CLI channel list.

highlights.title: CLI Account & Channel Commands
highlights.description: Add account auth/info/flood-status/flood-clear and channel resolve subcommands for full Telegram account management from the terminal.

highlights.title: CLI my-telegram & collect Commands
highlights.description: Add my-telegram leave/topics/cache-status/cache-clear and collect sample — read-only message preview without DB writes.
